entryExit.text:
Amarin Corporation plc (AMRN) — Entry / Exit Framework

HOLD zone: $13.32–$14.77 — current levels are fairly valued. No compelling reason to add or trim here.
Add / Initiate below $13.32 — material pullback that improves risk/reward.
Trim / Take Profits above $14.77 — approaching the 52-week high at $20.90. Risk/reward no longer favourable for new capital.
Stop-loss consideration: A sustained close below $8.15 (52-week low) would warrant reassessment.

sources.marketData: Live quote data sourced via DYOR HQ data pipeline (Google Sheets + Yahoo Finance). Fields include price, market capitalisation, 52-week range, P/E, EPS, and volume.
sources.companyFilings: Public company filings, regulatory announcements, investor presentations, and RNS where referenced in the analysis.
